mapper.select: select t1.status from sys_schedule_job t1 where t1.del_flag = '0' and id = #{id}
mapper.update: update sys_schedule_job set status = 1 where del_flag = '0' and id = #{id}
update sys_schedule_job set status = 0 where del_flag = '0' and id = #{id}
mapper.select: select t1.id, t1.job_name, t1.job_type, t1.job_group, t1.job_interval, t1.job_param, t1.status, t1.cron, t1.end_time, t1.start_time, t1.schedule_type, t1.interval_type, t1.remark, t1.job_class from sys_schedule_job t1 where t1.del_flag = '0' and t1.id = #{id}
